texto: For me, reading is so much more. Books teach you how other people think, and what they're feeling, and how they change from ordinary beings to extraordinary ones. Often they are so appealing and intelligent, you'd rather spend time reading about them than doing anything else.
explicacao: Citação de Jennifer Kaufman sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “For me, reading is so much more. Books teach you how other people think, and what they're feeling…” articula reflexao, books, reading em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e termino.
